scope: Codex-only deterministic source-prep follow-up artifact for the 23-source Chandra OCR PDF set referenced by data/chandra-ocr/pdf23-b16-20260623T124045Z.log. Only this review note was written.
inputs_inspected: raw/sources/<source_id>/blocks.jsonl for existing fallback surface counts only

provenance.note: The queue manifest is the 23-source cohort selector. Current per-source raw Chandra manifests are used for complete/partial classification and missing-page counts. Page-cache error files are used for failed-page counts because some current per-source manifest failed_pages arrays are stale or empty while their page JSON files are status:error.

deterministic_follow_up_assessment.explanation: The repo can deterministically rebuild raw/sources/<source_id>/blocks.jsonl from existing healthy Chandra page JSON plus pdf_text fallback for missing pages, but that does not create true chandra_ocr pages. The missing Chandra pages are failed OCR cache entries and require a Chandra/OCR retry or external operator action to become Chandra-complete.
deterministic_follow_up_assessment.existing_deterministic_fallback_state: All 21 partial sources already have raw blocks covering every PDF page by combining chandra_ocr pages with pdf_text fallback pages. This artifact did not rebuild or mutate those blocks.
relevant_repo_paths: packages/pipeline/src/sources/chandra.ts: queueChandraOcr/runChandraOcr invoke scripts/chandra/ocr_worker.py and then rebuildSourceBlocks; running these was out of scope.
packages/pipeline/src/sources/source-prep.ts: rebuildSourceBlocks/writeSourceBlocks can merge cached Chandra blocks with pdf_text fallback but mutates raw blocks, so it was not run.
packages/cli/src/commands/sources.ts: exposes chandra-queue/chandra-run/source-prep commands; none were run.

proposed_next_safe_codex_only_steps: Keep the 21 partial source ids and exact missing_pages arrays below as an operator retry target list; do not attempt to complete them from Codex without an explicit OCR/GPU lane.

If another Codex-only follow-up is desired, prepare a separate retry-manifest artifact grouped by failure reason and by small-missing-count sources; do not run chandra-queue because it writes data/chandra-ocr/latest.json.

Audit downstream readiness semantics separately: these partials are block-covered via pdf_text fallback, but they remain Chandra-partial. Treat any ingestion decision using fallback text as a reviewed policy choice, not as Chandra completion.

For an operator OCR lane, prioritize the low-missing-count partials first: meeting_doc_146831, meeting_doc_199181, meeting_doc_201521, meeting_doc_58631, meeting_doc_76741, meeting_doc_85841, meeting_doc_87841, meeting_doc_73241, and meeting_doc_87726.
